---
title: "VSURF 50%"
author: "Max Ranz de la Iglesia"
date: "2026-06-06"
output: html_document
---
```{r}
setwd("D:/Documentos/TFG/TFG-Selecci-de-variables-en-escenaris-complexos")
load("dades_escenari_50_corrAleat.RData")

library(VSURF)
library(futurize)
library(progressify)

plan(multisession, workers = 12)

una_iteracio_50 <- function(j, X_esc, Y_esc, num_vars) {
  library(VSURF)
  library(caret)

  X_df  <- as.data.frame(X_esc[[j]])
  y_fac <- as.factor(Y_esc[[j]])

  tryCatch({
    model_vsurf <- VSURF(x = X_df, y = y_fac,
                         parallel = FALSE,
                         verbose  = FALSE)

    # Índexs de les variables seleccionades (ja són numèrics directament)
    idx <- model_vsurf$varselect.interp
    idx <- idx[!is.na(idx) & idx >= 1 & idx <= num_vars]

    list(idx = idx, metrics = metriques(idx, nv = num_vars))

  }, error = function(e) {
    cat(sprintf("  [WARN VSURF] sim %d: %s\n", j, conditionMessage(e)))
    list(idx = integer(0), metrics = metriques(integer(0), nv = num_vars))
  })
}

resultats_vsurf <- data.frame(
  N = integer(), pi = numeric(), correlation = character(),
  Sensibilitat = numeric(), Especificitat = numeric(),
  VPP = numeric(), VPN = numeric(),
  Accuracy = numeric(), NetBenefit = numeric(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

vars_seleccionades_vsurf <- list()

system.time({
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(comb))) {

    N           <- comb$N[i]
    pi          <- comb$pi[i]
    correlation <- as.character(comb$correlation[i])

    cat(sprintf("Escenari %d/%d (N=%s, pi=%s, cor=%s)\n",
                i, nrow(comb), N, pi, correlation))

    resultats_iter <- lapply(1:iters, una_iteracio_50,
                             X_esc    = X[[i]],
                             Y_esc    = Y[[i]],
                             num_vars = num_vars) |>
                      progressify() |>
                      futurize(seed = 123)

    metrics_vs  <- lapply(resultats_iter, function(x) x$metrics)
    vars_bin_vs <- matrix(0, nrow = iters, ncol = num_vars)
    for (j in 1:iters) {
      idx <- resultats_iter[[j]]$idx
      if (length(idx) > 0) vars_bin_vs[j, idx] <- 1
    }

    resum <- function(ml, m) mean(sapply(ml, function(x) x[m]), na.rm = TRUE)

    resultats_vsurf <- rbind(
      resultats_vsurf,
      data.frame(
        N             = N,
        pi            = pi,
        correlation   = correlation,
        Sensibilitat  = resum(metrics_vs, "sensibilitat"),
        Especificitat = resum(metrics_vs, "especificitat"),
        VPP           = resum(metrics_vs, "VPP"),
        VPN           = resum(metrics_vs, "VPN"),
        Accuracy      = resum(metrics_vs, "accuracy"),
        NetBenefit    = resum(metrics_vs, "net_benefit"),
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    )

    vars_seleccionades_vsurf[[i]] <- vars_bin_vs
  }
})

print(resultats_vsurf)
save(resultats_vsurf, vars_seleccionades_vsurf,
     file = "resultats_vsurf_50_correlacio.RData")
```
